---
title: "Agreement"
---

ACE can compare coding across project files to help teams inspect consistency.

## When to use agreement

Use agreement after coders have independently coded the same sources with the same or comparable codebook.

Agreement summaries are most useful as a diagnostic tool. They show where coding is consistent and where the team may need to clarify definitions.

## Metric

ACE reports Gwet's AC1 for agreement summaries. The interpretation bands are:

- Reliable: 0.80 or higher
- Tentative: 0.60 to 0.79
- Unreliable: below 0.60
- Insufficient: fewer than 50 coded positions

## Export agreement data

Use agreement exports when you need a long-form record of spans, coders, sources, and codes for separate analysis.
